name: The Wellspring Deep
descriptionSeed: The pure pole: the Raw, who amplified feeling past all judgment and are now simply a weather system with faces. They feel everything, constantly, at maximum, and they are not in there anymore. Standing near them, you will begin to feel things that are not yours, and you will not be able to tell.
encounterFlavor: The Raw, who are a storm; feelings that are not yours arriving with total conviction; someone drowning in it who was fine an hour ago.
questSeeds: The Raw's weather has begun reaching Wellspring itself
A Threnodist has gone Raw deliberately, as an argument, and it is working
